dismissalText.commentary: Aiden Markram c Padikkal b Rasikh Salam 12 (8b 0x4 1x6 18m) SR: 150

dismissalComment.html: that is quite a bizarre dismissal! It's a full toss outside leg stump, at 136 kph, so not particularly slow. Markram tried to turn it on the leg side and played way too early. The ball may have shaped away just a touch. He got a leading edge that spooned tamely towards cover, he cannot quite believe what's happened as he walks back

dismissalText.commentary: Rishabh Pant c Salt b Kumar 1 (6b 0x4 0x6 9m) SR: 16.66

dismissalComment.html: caught superbly by Salt running in and to his left from the deep square leg boundary! Pant got low and whipped a low full toss off his pads, that chance would have fallen short of most fielders, but not Phil Salt. He sprinted in from the boundary edge and dived forward to take a superb low catch

dismissalText.commentary: Nicholas Pooran b Hazlewood 1 (7b 0x4 0x6 7m) SR: 14.28

dismissalComment.html: bowled him! LSG are sinking fast in Bengaluru. Hazlewood bowls a similar ball to all those deliveries that hassled Pant, short of a length, pitching in line with the stumps and angling across the left-hander. Pooran tried to pull but didn't have enough room, bottom edge on to his stumps. His miserable season continues

dismissalText.commentary: Abdul Samad c Patidar b Pandya 0 (2b 0x4 0x6 6m) SR: 0

dismissalComment.html: another soft, soft dismissal and the slowness of the pitch on show again. Krunal drifts the ball into the right-hander, pitching around leg and drifting down, Samad tries to turn the ball towards square leg but closes the face of the bat way too early, the leading edge loops up for a catch at cover
